insiderSecret.name: A glimpse of the Medici ledger
insiderSecret.description: An afternoon's careless talk in the Florence counting house — who the Medici are really lending to this season.

insiderSecret.name: A St Pol shipping manifest
insiderSecret.description: A clerk paid in the wrong coin lets slip which cargoes Simon's house is actually moving this quarter.

insiderSecret.name: Genoese freight rates, in confidence
insiderSecret.description: What the consortium is quietly charging its favoured shippers, and who those are.
